evidence: Abstract thought strongly resonates with semantic, structural, and epistemological understanding as it deals with meaning and cognitive processes. Its generative and transformative qualities align with creating new ideas, while its essential resonance ties to core mental faculties. Scores reflect its individual and resonant nature, avoiding physical or bodily associations.

Advise resonates most strongly with catalyzing change (interconnection.catalytic), information-sharing (ontological.informational), and ethical considerations (value_generation.ethical). It operates at individual/community/societal scales and requires understanding (epistemological.understanding) while touching essential aspects of thought (resonance.essential).

Analytic resonates strongly with understanding (epistemological.understanding), structural patterns (ontological.structural), and comprehension (experience.comprehension). It operates individually (scale.individual) and predictably (lawfulness.predictable). Scores drop where connections are indirect or speculative.

Analytical resonates strongest with understanding structures (epistemological.understanding 8), functional utility (value.functional 8), and the informational layer (ontological.informational 9). It operates primarily at the individual scale (scale.individual 7) and supports comprehension (experience.comprehension 9). Lower scores reflect its core focus on cognitive processes rather than broader existential or destructive dynamics.

Analyze strongly resonates with comprehension (8), functional value (7), and essential resonance (7), as it is central to understanding, practical utility, and the core of thought. It also aligns with transformative symmetry (6), catalytic interconnection (5), and structural patterns (5).

It also aligns with understanding logical structures (epistemological.understanding 5) and transformative change (symmetry.transformative 4). Lower scores reflect its role in individual/community scale, contingent contexts, and catalyzing effects.

It aids comprehension by organizing thoughts (structural, comprehension) and creates functional value through logical ordering. The brain's physical nature (ontological.material=10) and individual scale (scale.individual=10) strongly resonate. Functional utility (value_generation.functional=5) in medicine/tech also stands out.

Lower scores reflect weaker but real connections like comprehension (arriving at understanding) and structural patterns (logical frameworks).
